column2: # --- 1) Convert your coordinates to sf points (WGS84) ---
# --- 2) Get background shapes: Cuyahoga County + Cleveland city ---
geom_sf(data = cleveland, fill = NA, color = "purple", linewidth = 0.8) +
geom_sf(data = cinc_sf, color = "navy", shape = 4, stroke = 1.1, size = 3) +
geom_sf(data = epa_sf, color = "red3", fill = "red3", shape = 21, size = 3) +
data = epa_sf, aes(label = SiteLab, geometry = geometry),
# optional: show fewer CinC labels by sampling (uncomment to label all if wanted)
#   data = cinc_sf, aes(label = DeviceLab, geometry = geometry),
labs(title = "EPA AQS Sites and CLEANinCLE Devices in Cuyahoga County",
subtitle = "Red = EPA sites (with site numbers), Blue X = CLEANinCLE devices\nPurple outline = City of Cleveland",
